payload.title: [CRITICAL] Stored XSS in ticket drawer (branch/pr_url/assignee/labels/parent_id)
payload.description: renderDrawer (src/web/app.js:2224-2242) interpolates these user fields into value="..." via innerHTML WITHOUT escapeHtml (title/description are escaped; these are the outliers). A member sets branch='">' via UI/CLI/sync; anyone opening that ticket's drawer runs script -> session/token theft across the board. FIX: escapeHtml each interpolation (match renderCard/searchRow which already escape).
